channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: EV Performance in Extreme Temperatures: AAA Testing
item.description: AAA conducted tests to measure the impact of cold and heat on electric vehicle range.

item.title: DHS Shutdown Ends; May Day Protests Planned
item.description: The Department of Homeland Security shutdown has concluded. May Day protests are anticipated in cities nationwide.

item.title: Quiz: The Trump administration targeted _____ this week
item.description: Federal government activity included paint jobs, indictments and commemorative items. Test your knowledge with this week's quiz.

item.title: Chinese tech worker replaced by AI, legal challenges arise
item.description: A Hangzhou-based tech worker was dismissed after his role was taken over by artificial intelligence. An appeals court is reviewing the legality of the action.
